text.title: ollama-agent-integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ollama-agent-integration as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Starting agent with sleep X then assuming Ollama is ready.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ollama serve must be confirmed running before agent startup — implement retry loop with timeout check against /api/tags, not sleep X then start agent.
